title: LiDAR & RGB-D Multimodal Sensor Fusion System
description: Engineered a hands-on multimodal data pipeline achieving high-fidelity 3D color-depth fusion by spatially aligning sparse LiDAR point clouds with RGB-D visual streams. Currently utilizing this synthesized 3D environment to research deep learning architectures.

title: Contextual Bandits for Movie Recommendation
description: Engineered and evaluated a real-time recommendation engine using Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMAB). Implemented LinUCB, Thompson Sampling, and a novel Stochastic Reward formulation resulting in a 53.42% CTR.

title: AI-Powered Career Analytics & LLM Integration
description: Integrated large language models (DeepSeek-v3.1 via OpenRouter API) to dynamically process user profiles. Architected robust data persistence with Spring Data JPA and MySQL.

title: Relational Database Optimization for Academic Systems
description: Designed and optimized relational database schemas for a high-throughput attendance tracking system, focusing on efficient data retrieval and secure authorization roles.
